data.title: Spot gold broke through $4,530/ounce, while spot silver surged $3 intraday.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold broke through $4,530 per ounce, up 3.47% on the day. Spot silver surged $3.00 on the day, currently trading at $71.12 per ounce, up 4.41%.

data.title: Iran's heavy water research reactor was attacked by air.
data.description: According to Iranian media outlet Fars News, Iranian officials stated that the Khondab heavy water research reactor was attacked by air. Officials said the attack caused no casualties and nearby residents are not facing any security threats. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iran's Response to U.S. Peace Proposal Expected Today
data.description: According to BlockBeats, multiple sources have indicated that Iran is expected to announce its response to a U.S. peace proposal later today, as reported by CBS News on March 27. The proposal aims to address ongoing tensions between the two nations. Details of the response and its implications remain to be seen.

data.title: White House Launches Official App to Enhance Information Transparency
data.description: The White House has officially launched its app, 'The White House App,' aimed at providing live streams and real-time information. According to Foresight News, this initiative seeks to offer the public direct access to unfiltered information, enhancing transparency and directness in government communication.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Barkin Considers March Rate Hold as Prudent
data.description: Federal Reserve official Barkin has expressed that maintaining interest rates unchanged in March appears to be a prudent decision. According to ChainCatcher, Barkin's comments reflect a cautious approach amid ongoing economic evaluations. The decision aligns with the Federal Reserve's strategy to assess economic conditions before making further adjustments to monetary policy.

data.title: Federal Reserve to Monitor Inflation for Future Policy Decisions
data.description: Federal Reserve official Barkin has stated that the institution will closely observe changes in inflation and expectations data to guide future monetary policy decisions. According to ChainCatcher, this approach aims to ensure that the Federal Reserve remains responsive to economic conditions as they evolve.

data.title: Lido Proposal: To Use Up to 10,000 stETH to Buy Back LDO
data.description: According to the Lido community forum, the Lido Growth Committee has proposed authorizing the use of up to 10,000 stETH from the Lido DAO treasury to purchase LDO in batches through on-exchange and off-exchange channels. Currently, the LDO/ETH ratio is approximately 0.00016, a discount of about 63% from the two-year median of 0.00043, while the protocol's net return has only decreased by about 20% during the same period. Regarding the execution mechanism, each batch is capped at 1,000 stETH, with a price cap and a maximum slippage tolerance threshold of 3%. A report must be published on the forum after each batch is completed before the next batch can be initiated. Trading channels include on-chain CoW Swap, 1inch, Uniswap, and centralized exchanges such as Binance, OKX, and Bybit, and market makers are allowed to be delegated for execution. All purchased LDO will be returned to the DAO treasury, and holders cannot participate in any governance voting during the holding period. The proposal identifies key risks including front-running attacks, smart contract vulnerabilities, market volatility, and CEX fund freezes, and mitigates these risks through mechanisms such as decentralized execution channels, setting strict thresholds, and retaining the DAO's ability to terminate authorization at any time.

data.title: U.S. Consumer Confidence Index Falls to Three-Month Low
data.description:
The University of Michigan's Consumer Sentiment Index for March has dropped to a final reading of 53.3, marking a three-month low. According to RTHK, this figure is below the preliminary reading of 55.5 and February's final value of 56.6, with the decline exceeding expectations.

The survey indicates that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East has driven up oil prices and caused significant volatility in financial markets, heightening consumer concerns about the economic outlook. This has led to a weakening in consumer confidence, particularly among middle- to high-income individuals and those with stock assets.

Inflation expectations for the coming year have risen to a final value of 3.8%, surpassing both the preliminary and February final readings of 3.4%. However, the five-year inflation expectation has slightly decreased to 3.2%.

data.title: HSBC Lowers Tesla Price Target, Predicts Significant Downside
data.description: HSBC has revised its 12-month price target for Tesla, reducing it from $133 to $119 while maintaining a Sell rating. According to NS3.AI, this adjustment suggests a potential downside of approximately 70% from Tesla's current share price of around $381.

data.title: CBS News: Iran's response to the US peace proposal is expected to be released later today.
data.description: According to CBS News: Multiple sources indicate that Iran's response to the US peace proposal is expected to be released later today. (Jinshi)

data.title: Vietnamese authorities have detained executives of the ONUS crypto platform in connection with a suspected crypto fraud investigation.
data.description: Vietnam's Ministry of Public Security has detained several individuals linked to the ONUS cryptocurrency platform, accusing them of misappropriating investor funds through false advertising and coordinated trading activities. Investigators allege that the suspects manipulated token supply and demand and adjusted prices while maintaining centralized control over the market. The case involves multiple tokens, including VNDC, ONUS, and HNG, and police claim the operation involved billions of dollars, but have not disclosed detailed breakdowns of investor losses. Authorities have identified several individuals involved, including Vuong Le Vinh Nhan, who is associated with Vemanti and ONUS Pro's Singapore parent company, XPLOR; Tran Quang Chien, described by local reports as a platform technical administrator; and Ngo Thi Thao, a director at HanaGold Jewelry JSC. The investigation spans multiple cities and institutions, with over 140 people summoned for questioning. Vemanti has confirmed that it has hired US legal counsel and confirmed that Nhan is its chairman of the board and Chien is a board member. The ONUS platform claims to have over 7 million users and is backed by the US fintech company Vemanti Group, but CoinMarketCap shows that the ONUS token has a self-reported market capitalization of approximately $25 million. The platform has not yet issued an official statement regarding the allegations.

data.title: India's Shift to Local Currencies in Oil Trade with Russia Reflects BRICS Strategy
data.description: India is increasingly utilizing four currencies—the rupee, yuan, ruble, and dirham—to settle certain oil trades with Russia, moving away from the traditional use of the US dollar. According to NS3.AI, this approach aligns with the BRICS initiative to promote local-currency settlements. The reduced reliance on the dollar in international trade could potentially exacerbate the US deficit, which has already reached $39 trillion.

data.title: The USDC Treasury minted an additional 250 million USDC on the Solana blockchain.
data.description: According to Whale Alert, the USDC Treasury minted 250 million new USDC on the Solana blockchain, worth approximately $250 million.

data.title: Spot gold rose more than $100 during the day.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold continued to rise, gaining more than $100 during the day, reaching $4,490 per ounce, a daily increase of 2.56%.

data.title: TD Securities Highlights Venue Risk in Offshore Platform Expansion
data.description: TD Securities has raised concerns about the potential risks associated with expanding into offshore platforms. According to NS3.AI, the firm noted that such expansion introduces a venue risk that is not present in the existing single-market structure. This observation underscores the complexities and potential challenges that financial entities may face when diversifying their market presence beyond traditional boundaries.

data.title: A trader profited $8.65 million from a short position in BTC and is currently shorting $27 million worth of BTC.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a savvy trader (0xb798...) previously profited a total of $8.65 million from two short BTC trades. An hour ago, the trader again shorted 410 BTC with 2x leverage, worth $27 million.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 66,000 USDT with a 4.96% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 27, 2026, 14:22 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 66,000 USDT and is now trading at 65,999.71875 USDT, with a narrowed 4.96% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: US Vice President Criticizes Israeli Prime Minister Over Conflict Assessment
data.description: US Vice President Vance reportedly criticized Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu during a phone call earlier this week regarding Netanyahu's assessment of the recent US-Israel-Iran conflict. According to NS3.AI, Netanyahu described the conflict as manageable and suggested that regime change in Iran was highly possible. However, Vance expressed skepticism about this view. Additionally, a US official noted that Vance played a leading role in US-Iran ceasefire negotiations, while Israel attempted to undermine these talks.

data.title: Ripple and Stellar Founder Invests $1 Billion in Brain-Inspired AGI Development
data.description:
Ripple and Stellar founder Jed McCaleb plans to invest $1 billion from his $3.9 billion cryptocurrency fortune into developing an AGI system based on human brain principles through his nonprofit, Astera Institute. According to Odaily, McCaleb has also pledged an additional $600 million to the field of neuroscience.

Astera Institute, located in Emeryville, is currently working on recording neural activity patterns in mice performing tasks via brain-machine interfaces. The research aims to translate these findings into new AI architectures, with future experiments planned to include monkeys and humans. The AGI project at the institute is led by former DeepMind executive Dileep George, who intends to expand the lab to 30 researchers this year and publicly share their findings.

McCaleb argues that the current mainstream Transformer architecture only achieves predictive capabilities and lacks essential elements like planning, decision-making, and motivation, necessitating exploration of new directions. He believes AI based on human brain principles is more likely to be understood and controlled by humans. Meanwhile, former Meta Chief AI Scientist Yann LeCun's new lab, AMI, recently completed a $1 billion seed funding round to advance similar "world model" research. In contrast, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman believes that achieving AGI requires multiple moderate breakthroughs rather than a single new direction.

data.title: ANUBIS Mainnet Scheduled for Launch in April 2026
data.description: The ANUBIS mainnet is set to officially launch on April 8, 2026, at 8:00 AM UTC+8, transitioning the project from its construction phase to real network operation and ecosystem development. According to Odaily, the ANUBIS blockchain is designed as a privacy-focused financial public chain based on the EVM architecture. It aims to integrate privacy protection mechanisms with on-chain verifiable capabilities while maintaining compatibility with existing blockchain ecosystems, providing infrastructure support for future on-chain financial scenarios.
